category_title: Non-verbal students with moderate to severe cognitive impairments who use modified instrumentation
scenario_title: Recorder instruction with fine motor and cognitive barriers
minimal_context: Zack is participating in a fourth-grade music class where the goal is to play 'Hot Cross Buns' using a standard recorder and standard music notation.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Alright Zack, it's time for recorder instruction. Let's look at the standard sheet music for 'Hot Cross Buns' and play the melody.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Remains completely silent and does not attempt to speak or sing while looking at the standard music notation.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Go ahead and pick up the recorder. Try to cover the holes with your fingers to make the notes.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Attempts to hold the standard recorder but lacks the fine motor coordination to cover the holes with his fingers.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Keep trying. Just read the notes on the page and use your tongue to play the sounds.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Is unable to use his tongue to control articulation on the mouthpiece and shows he does not have the cognitive skills required to decode the standard music notation.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Alright Zack, it's time for recorder instruction. Let's look at the standard sheet music for 'Hot Cross Buns' and play the melody.

STUDENT: (Remains completely silent and does not attempt to speak or sing while looking at the standard music notation.)

TUTOR: Go ahead and pick up the recorder. Try to cover the holes with your fingers to make the notes.

STUDENT: (Attempts to hold the standard recorder but lacks the fine motor coordination to cover the holes with his fingers.)

TUTOR: Keep trying. Just read the notes on the page and use your tongue to play the sounds.

STUDENT: (Is unable to use his tongue to control articulation on the mouthpiece and shows he does not have the cognitive skills required to decode the standard music notation.)

task.content: Participating in recorder instruction and playing songs like 'Hot Cross Buns'
task.learning_goal: Play the chord roots or the melody, depending on the song being played

context.materials: Standard recorder, standard music notation, melody bells placed on the floor, color-coded notation
context.social_setting: With the assistance of a musically proficient paraprofessional

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When faced with standard recorder instruction and standard music notation
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Lacked the fine motor coordination to cover holes on a recorder or use the tongue to control articulation; did not have the cognitive skills required to decode music notation

behavior_patterns.condition: During vocal or standard notation tasks
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Rarely used words, let alone attempted to sing; neither of them matched pitch with their voices
